heavy.label: Heavy
heavy.trait: Freight-train top speed, shrugs off hits

racers.name: Fenna Blaze
racers.bio: A stunt-show fox who treats every guardrail as a suggestion and every gap as a dare.

racers.name: Sprocket
racers.bio: A squirrel on her fourth espresso, convinced brakes are for people with spare time.

racers.name: Pip Nimbus
racers.bio: A static-charged cloud sprite who drifts through corners it technically never touches.

racers.name: Colonel Crumb
racers.bio: A gingerbread officer holding the racing line with a sugar-glaze helmet and zero fear.

racers.name: Duke Inkwell
racers.bio: A jazz-singing octopus who steers with six arms and conducts the pit crew with two.

racers.name: Marina Volt
racers.bio: An electric-eel sparkwright who wired her own kart — and, allegedly, the competition's.

racers.name: Rusty Piston
racers.bio: A fairground robot who has been doing loops since before loops were considered cool.

racers.name: Sir Reginald Thistle
racers.bio: A peacock aristocrat who insists the trophy simply happens to match his plumage.

racers.name: Basalt
racers.bio: A mountain golem of few words. The mountain, however, is moving at 140 mph.

racers.name: Mama Magma
racers.bio: A lava-bear baker whose victory cakes are legally classified as geothermal events.

racers.name: Captain Brine
racers.bio: A walrus captain who has never once lifted, on land or at sea.

racers.name: Old Mossback
racers.bio: An ancient treant who grew his own kart and refuses to say from what.
